verses.text: Tua ciangin Topa in David kiangah kamsang Nathan sawl hi. Amah hong pai-in David kiangah, “Khuapi khat sungah mi nih om a, khat hau-in a khat zawng hi
A haupa in tuuhon leh bawnghon tampi nei hi

Ahih hangin a zawngpa in bangmah neilo a, a leisa tuuno a nu khat bek nei hi. Amah in tua tuuno khoi a, amah leh a tate tawh khangkhawm hi. Ama an ne-in a hai panin dawn a, ama ang sungah lum a, ama-a' dingin tanu tawh kibang hi

Tu-in mihaupa' inn-ah zin khat hong tung a, amah in a tuuhon ahi a, a bawnghon pan ahi zongin ama kiangah a tung khualzinpa-a' dingin a gawh ding la nuamloin mizawngpa' tuuno laksak a, ama kianga a tung mipa-a' dingin a gawhsak hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin tua mipa' tungah David sinso mahmah hi. Amah in Nathan kiangah, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin hih banga a gamta mipa a sih ding kilawm hi
Amah hih bangin gamta a, amah in hehpihna neilo ahih manin a tuuno a zah li-in loh ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah, “Nang pen tua mipa na hi hi. Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Israel-te tungah kumpi-in nang sathau hong nilhin Saul' khutsung panin nang kong honkhia hi
Keimah in na topa' inn leh na topa' zite na khutsungah kong pia a, Israel-te leh Judah mite nang kong pia hi. Hihte a tawmlua hi leh tua zah nih a hong pia khin ding ka hi hi
Ama muhna-ah a sia a gamta dingin bang hangin Topa' thu simmawh na hi hiam? Nangmah in Hit mi Uriah namsau tawh vatin, ama zi nangma zi dingin na la a, Ammon mite' namsau tawh amah na that khin hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in nangmah in kei hong simmawhin Hit mi Uriah' zi nangma zi dingin la khin na hih manin na inn sungah namsau tawh kidona veng ngeilo ding hi,’ ci hi

Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘En in, keimah in nangma innkuan sung panin nangma langah siatna a piangsak ding khat ka khangsak ding hi. Na zite na muhin la-in na vengpa' tungah ka pia ding a, amah in sun nitaang sungah na zite luppih ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in a simthamin na hih hi; ahih hangin keimah in Israel-te khempeuh' muh dingin suntangpi-in ka hih ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
David in hih thu a zak ciangin Nathan kiangah, “ Topa' tungah ka khial khin hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Nathan in David kiangah, “ Topa in zong na khialhna hong maisak khinzo hi; nang na si kei ding hi
Ahi zongin, hih bangin gamtatna tawh Topa thusim peuhmahlo na hih manin nang' sung panin a hong piang naungek si ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Nathan a inn-ah a ciah hi. Tua ciangin Uriah' zi in David tawh a neih naungek Topa in vat a, a ci hong na hi
Tua ahih ciangin David in naungek-a' dingin Pasian' tungah thum hi. David in an tangin zan tawntung leilakah a lum hi
Tua ciangin leilak panin a phong dingin a innsung upate ama kiangah ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amah tholo a, amaute tawh an zong ne nuamlo hi

A ni sagih ni-in naungek si hi. Ama kiangah, naungek si hi, ci-in a gen ding uh David' nasemte lau uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Naungek a hin'lai nangawnin amah i hopih hangin i thu hong ngailo hi. Tua ahih ciangin bangci-in ama kiangah, naungek si, ci ngam ding ihi hiam? Amahmah kisusia khading hi,” a ci uh hi

Ahih hangin ama nasemte a kihuauna uh David in a muh ciangin naungek si hi, ci-in a thei hi. Tua ciangin David in a nasemte kiangah, “Naungek si ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Amaute in, “Amah si ta hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin David leilak panin tho-in kisil a, sathau nilhin a puante khek a, Topa' inn-ah pai-in Pasian a bia hi. Tua ciangin ama inn-ah ciah hi. An a nget ciangin amaute in a mai-ah lui uh a, amah in a ne hi
Tua ciangin a nasemte in ama kiangah, “Hih banga na gamtatna a bangci hiam? Naungek a hin' lai-in an tangin na kap hi; ahih hangin naungek a sih ciangin tho-in an na ne zawsop hi,” a ci uh hi

Amah in, “Naungek a hin' lai-in an tangin ka kap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh, ‘Naungek a hin'na dingin Topa in kei hong hehpih ding hiam, hong hehpihlo ding hiam, cih kua in theikhol ahi hiam?’ ka ci hi
Ahih hangin tu-in amah si ta hi; bang hangin an tang nawn ding ka hi hiam? Amah lakik thei ding ka hi hiam? Ama kiangah kei ka pai ding a, ahih hangin kei kiangah amah hong kiklo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David in a zi Bathsheba hehnem a, ama kiangah pai-in amah tawh a lumkhawm hi. Tuanu in tapa khat nei a, a min Solomon a phuak hi. Topa in tua naupang it ahih manin
kamsang Nathan' tungah thu puak hi. Topa' itna hangin ama min Jedidiah a phuah ding a gen hi.
Tu-in Joab in Ammon khuapi Rabbah simin a khuapi tuikhuk la hi
Joab in David kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “Rabbah khuapi ka sim a, a khuapi tuikhuk ka la khin hi
Tua ahih ciangin mi a omlaiteng kaikhawm in la, khuapi langah phual satin khuapi la in; tua hi kei leh keimah in khuapi la-in keima min pua khading hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David in mi khempeuh kaikhawmin Rabbah-ah pai a, tua khuapi simin a la hi

Tua ciangin amah in amau' pasian Molek lu tungah a om lukhu a laksak hi. Tua lukhu kham talen khat gik a, a sungah suangmanpha khat om hi. David' kumpi lukhu tungah tua suangmanpha kikoih hi. Tua ciangin amah in khuapi sunga vankinusiate tampi tak paikhiatpih hi

Amah in a sunga om mite paikhiatpihin singatnate, tuzumte, leh heite tawh na a sem dingin koih a, leiseek seekna-ah amaute na semsak hi. Tua bangin Ammon mite' khuapi khempeuh a hih hi. Tua ciangin David leh mi khempeuh Jerusalem-ah a ciah uh hi.
